LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF RESPONDENT DAVID WONG'S REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION OF COURT'S RULING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION (ON 02-18-04). NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANT-MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION RE COSTS ONLY. COSTS WHICH WERE PREVIOUSLY ALLOWED IN 02-18-04 ORDER ARE NOW HEREBY DENIED. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
